title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: First-party LangChain integration; use Ollama models for chat, tools, retrieval, agents, etc.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface); no API keys needed, runs entirely local.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; synchronous & async APIs, model management, embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, and delete models from Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Interactive Node CLI for chatting with any Ollama model; history, markdown rendering, themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style code completer for VS Code (local, no telemetry).

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration; use Ollama generators & embedders in production-grade pipelines.

title: ollama-curl
summary: 100-line Bash wrapper around curl for quick Ollama prompts from the terminal.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats via Ollama; slash commands, thread support, mod roles.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama in Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama; GenServer-based client with streaming and supervised pulls.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama; async/await, static binaries, and tiny runtime footprint.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate for Ollama; strongly typed, async tokio client with serde models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance; generate summaries, rewrite notes, Q&A via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels/DMs; mentions, threads, emoji reactions.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot with group and private chat support, session isolation, and per-user model choice.
